title: Follow Target Captain Behavior
description: Allows mob to move towards its current target captain.

follow_distance.title: Follow Distance
follow_distance.description: Defines the distance in blocks the mob will stay from its target while following.

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description: Defines the maximum distance in blocks a mob can get from its target captain before giving up trying to follow it.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
